name: github_get_actions_cache_usage_by_repo_for_org
description: List repositories with GitHub Actions cache usage for an organization (GET /orgs/{org}/actions/cache/usage-by-repository). Returns total_count and repository_cache_usages (full_name, active_caches_size_in_bytes, active_caches_count). per_page 1-100 default 100, page, all_pages, max_pages. Requires org owner; classic tokens need admin:org scope. See GitHub REST Actions cache.
